entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Moenie huiwering ignoreer nie; onsekerheid is ’n nuttige sein vir hersiening.

entries.source: inspir turns curiosity, homework, revision, and big questions into guided AI learning sessions that explain, ask back, and help you practise.
entries.value: inspir verander nuuskierigheid, huiswerk, hersiening en groot vrae in begeleide KI-leersessies wat verduidelik, terugvra en jou help oefen.

entries.source: Students who need a next step, a mistake check, or feedback without losing ownership of the assignment.
entries.value: Studente wat ’n volgende stap, ’n foutkontrole of terugvoer nodig het sonder om eienaarskap van die opdrag te verloor.

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Stap in historiese konteks in, vergelyk argumente en oefen om ’n idee van meer as een kant te sien.

entries.source: subject hubs mapped to learner needs
The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: Die slotmoment keer terug na die missie: openbare toegang, skole en ’n meer oop manier om te leer.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Vra enige vraag en leer deur duidelike verduidelikings, voorbeelde, opvolgprompts en geduldige KI-tutorskap.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: Die webwerf is ’n roete, nie ’n brosjure nie.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes with specific teaching shapes: hints, Socratic questions, quizzes, active recall, role-play, debate, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir is georganiseer rondom leermodusse met spesifieke onderrigvorme: wenke, Sokratiese vrae, vasvrae, aktiewe herroeping, rolspel, debat, skryfterugvoer en studiebeplanning.

entries.source: Use public guest modes for free, then explore the open-source work and school deployment paths.
entries.value: Gebruik openbare gasmodusse gratis, en verken dan die oopbronwerk en skoolontplooiingspaaie.

entries.source: Explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, writing, code, debate, and study planning.
entries.value: Verduidelikings, Sokratiese tutorskap, huiswerkafrigting, vasvrae, flitskaarte, skryfwerk, kode, debat en studiebeplanning.

entries.source: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: Kom los met huiswerk deur etiese wenke, voorbeelde, kontroles en stap-vir-stap-afrigting.

entries.source: AI Exam Prep Plan With Quizzes and Active Recall
entries.value: KI-eksamenvoorbereidingsplan met vasvrae en aktiewe herroeping

entries.source: Debate helps you separate claims, evidence, values, and assumptions, which makes historical interpretation more precise.
entries.value: Debat help jou om stellings, bewyse, waardes en aannames van mekaar te skei, wat historiese interpretasie presieser maak.

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Begin met plek, tyd, identiteit, beperkings en bewysetikette sodat die toneel nie generiese rolspel word nie.

entries.source: What should I include in a homework prompt?
entries.value: Wat moet ek in ’n huiswerkprompt insluit?

entries.source: Contributions are welcome from engineers, educators, designers, students, and anyone who wants AI learning to be safer, clearer, more accessible, and more useful.
entries.value: Bydraes is welkom van ingenieurs, opvoeders, ontwerpers, studente en enigiemand wat wil hê KI-leer moet veiliger, duideliker, toegankliker en nuttiger wees.

entries.source: A practical AI learning path for moving from confusion to clear explanation, Socratic questions, examples, and active recall.
entries.value: ’n Praktiese KI-leerpad wat jou van verwarring na duidelike verduideliking, Sokratiese vrae, voorbeelde en aktiewe herroeping neem.

entries.source: inspir began as quizzes and student communities, grew through schools and events, and now uses AI to make one-to-one learning more accessible.
entries.value: inspir het as vasvrae en studentegemeenskappe begin, deur skole en geleenthede gegroei en gebruik nou KI om een-tot-een-leer toegankliker te maak.

entries.source: Turn these missed questions into flashcards grouped by concept, formula, definition, and example.
entries.value: Verander hierdie gemiste vrae in flitskaarte gegroepeer volgens begrip, formule, definisie en voorbeeld.

entries.source: Know what to try next, why a step works, where the mistake happened, and how to revise the final answer in your own voice.
entries.value: Weet wat om volgende te probeer, waarom ’n stap werk, waar die fout gebeur het en hoe om die finale antwoord in jou eie stem te hersien.

entries.source: Learn with a free AI tutor for explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Leer met ’n gratis KI-tutor vir verduidelikings, Sokratiese vrae, huiswerkafrigting, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, skryfterugvoer, koderingshulp en studiebeplanning.

entries.source: Use debate to compare the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Gebruik debat om die sterkste stelling en sterkste teenstelling te vergelyk.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Moenie ná die eerste verduideliking stop nie; laat jouself vrae daaroor beantwoord.

entries.source: Search pages, blog guides, prompts, and live modes are linked around a simple loop: ask, try, check, repair, and review.
entries.value: Soekbladsye, bloggidse, prompts en lewendige modusse is rondom ’n eenvoudige lus verbind: vra, probeer, kontroleer, herstel en hersien.

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Genereer ’n gefokusde veelkeusevasvra oor enige vak en hersien verduidelikings ná elke antwoord.

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Moenie ’n hersiene paragraaf aanvaar voordat jy kan verduidelik waarom die hersiening beter is nie.

entries.source: My exam is on this date. Here is the syllabus, my weak areas, and my available time. Make a realistic plan with daily recall.
entries.value: My eksamen is op hierdie datum. Hier is die sillabus, my swak areas en my beskikbare tyd. Maak ’n realistiese plan met daaglikse herroeping.

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Leer Enigiets met ’n gratis KI-tutor: praktiese gids

entries.source: Let me interview this historical person. Keep answers evidence-aware and mark uncertainty clearly.
entries.value: Laat my hierdie historiese persoon ondervra. Hou antwoorde bewysbewus en merk onsekerheid duidelik.

entries.source: Built from real learner behavior, not a generic chat box.
entries.value: Gebou uit werklike leerdergedrag, nie ’n generiese kletsboks nie.

entries.source: The blog is organized around real study moments: getting unstuck, remembering more, writing better, preparing for exams, and exploring ideas with a patient tutor.
entries.value: Die blog is georganiseer rondom werklike studiemomente: loskom, meer onthou, beter skryf, vir eksamens voorberei en idees saam met ’n geduldige tutor verken.

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: Die blog verbind nuttige leerraad met lewendige oefening, sodat ’n gids in een stap ’n studiesessie kan word.

entries.source: Paste the question and what you have tried, then ask for the smallest useful next step.
entries.value: Plak die vraag en wat jy probeer het, en vra dan vir die kleinste nuttige volgende stap.

entries.source: Learners who feel stuck at the beginning of a new subject or need a simpler path into a difficult idea.
entries.value: Leerders wat aan die begin van ’n nuwe vak vassteek of ’n eenvoudiger pad in ’n moeilike idee nodig het.

entries.source: accessibility, prompts, tests, safer AI behavior, learner flows, and UI polish.
entries.value: toeganklikheid, prompts, toetse, veiliger KI-gedrag, leerdervloeie en gebruikerskoppelvlakafwerking.

entries.source: Write exactly where you got stuck before asking for help.
entries.value: Skryf presies waar jy vasgehaak het voordat jy hulp vra.

entries.source: Explore History and Big Ideas With AI
entries.value: Verken geskiedenis en groot idees met KI

entries.source: Explore history, public figures, causes, debates, philosophy, and source critique with AI learning modes that separate evidence from simulation.
entries.value: Verken geskiedenis, openbare figure, oorsake, debatte, filosofie en bronkritiek met KI-leermodusse wat bewyse van simulasie skei.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for learner questions, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: Die openbare webwerf is gestruktureer soos ’n leerkaart: lewendige modusse vir onmiddellike hulp, vakhubs vir leerdersvrae en gidse wat lees in aksie verander.

entries.source: Write a three-sentence explanation without looking, then ask the Socratic mode to find the weak link.
entries.value: Skryf ’n drie-sin-verduideliking sonder om te kyk, en vra dan die Sokratiese modus om die swak skakel te vind.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Vra vir ’n wenk, nie die antwoord nie

entries.source: Available publicly while schools can run confidential custom versions.
entries.value: Openbaar beskikbaar, terwyl skole vertroulike pasgemaakte weergawes kan gebruik.

entries.source: Move into Socratic questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, role-play, and guided instruction.
entries.value: Beweeg na Sokratiese vrae, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, rolspel en begeleide onderrig.
Hersien sonder om jou stem te verloor

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Hoe om met KI te studeer sonder om jouself te kul

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Vra vir die onderwerp in gewone taal, en vra dan vir een analogie, een voorbeeld en een algemene wanopvatting.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Moenie notas herlees voordat jy toets wat jy reeds kan herroep nie.

entries.source: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Verander jou sillabus, eksamendatum, tyd en swak areas in ’n praktiese studieplan.

entries.source: Pages are designed to move people from explanation into a live mode, prompt, quiz, or review loop.
entries.value: Bladsye is ontwerp om mense van verduideliking na ’n lewendige modus, prompt, vasvra of hersieningslus te beweeg.

entries.source: A tutor for the first question
Supports extracurricular learning, academic practice, and curiosity.
entries.value: Ondersteun buitekurrikulêre leer, akademiese oefening en nuuskierigheid.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: KI-flitskaarte en aktiewe herroeping: hoe om meer te onthou

entries.source: Move from a plain-language explanation into questions, examples, and memory practice.
entries.value: Beweeg van ’n gewone-taal-verduideliking na vrae, voorbeelde en geheue-oefening.

entries.source: Here is the question and what I tried. Give me the smallest useful hint, not the final answer.
entries.value: Hier is die vraag en wat ek probeer het. Gee my die kleinste nuttige wenk, nie die finale antwoord nie.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.
entries.value: Vasvrae wys gewoonlik meer omdat hulle herroeping toets. Herlees kan help nadat ’n vasvra wys wat herstel moet word.

entries.source: Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Beantwoord ’n kontrolevraag, probeer ’n stap, debatteer ’n stelling, hersien ’n konsep of bou herroepkaarte.

entries.source: How to Understand a Hard Topic With AI
entries.value: Hoe om ’n moeilike onderwerp met KI te verstaan

entries.source: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Verstaan kode, ontfout foute, leer programmeringsbegrippe en bou klein projekte stap vir stap.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flitskaarte werk die beste wanneer hulle een idee op ’n slag toets, antwoorde eers ná moeite wys en gemiste kaarte gouer hersien.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Elke nie-toepassingsblad het nou ’n taak: bou vertroue, verduidelik die leerroete en stuur leerders na ’n nuttige volgende aksie sonder om die belangrike besonderhede weg te steek.

entries.source: Turn the corrected mistake into a flashcard or short checklist for later.
entries.value: Verander die reggemaakte fout in ’n flitskaart of kort kontrolelys vir later.

entries.source: Custom AI learning spaces with data confidentiality.
Turn the explanation into active recall cards with one conceptual card, one example card, and one misconception card.
entries.value: Verander die verduideliking in kaarte vir aktiewe herroeping met een begripskaart, een voorbeeldkaart en een wanopvattingskaart.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Debatteer hierdie historiese of filosofiese stelling van albei kante. Skei bewyse, aannames en waardes.

entries.source: inspir exists for the moment a learner wants to understand something and needs a patient place to begin. The film introduces the product as a free public learning companion for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: inspir bestaan vir die oomblik wanneer ’n leerder iets wil verstaan en ’n geduldige plek nodig het om te begin. Die film stel die produk bekend as ’n gratis openbare leermetgesel vir nuuskierigheid, oefening en toegang.

entries.source: Start each session with a quick quiz before rereading.
entries.value: Begin elke sessie met ’n vinnige vasvra voordat jy herlees.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Ja. Openbare onderwerpkletse soos Leer Enigiets, Sokratiese onderrig, Huiswerkafrigter, vasvrae en flitskaarte maak direk in gasmodus oop.

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Bou ’n tydpaspoort, werk deur die reisadvies en verken ’n historiese wêreld deur toneel, kaart, tydlyn, mense, reëls, inventaris en bewyse.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Sokratiese tutorskap gebruik vrae, hipoteses, wenke en nadenke om dieper begrip te bou as passiewe antwoordlees.

entries.source: Give feedback on structure, clarity, and evidence. Keep my voice and do not rewrite the whole answer.
entries.value: Gee terugvoer oor struktuur, duidelikheid en bewyse. Behou my stem en moenie die hele antwoord herskryf nie.

entries.source: For math or logic, work one step at a time and ask why each move is allowed before moving on.
entries.value: Werk vir wiskunde of logika een stap op ’n slag en vra waarom elke skuif toegelaat word voordat jy verder gaan.

entries.source: Check the reasoning line by line
entries.value: Kontroleer die redenasie reël vir reël

entries.source: Can I cite AI historical dialogue as a source?
entries.value: Kan ek KI-historiese dialoog as ’n bron aanhaal?

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Nee. Behandel gegenereerde dialoog as ’n leersimulasie. Haal regte primêre of sekondêre bronne vir feitelike stellings aan.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Begin met die taak wat jy gedoen moet kry.

entries.source: Use inspir for step-by-step math help, homework hints, Socratic reasoning, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep without answer-copying.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir vir stap-vir-stap-wiskundehulp, huiswerkwenke, Sokratiese redenasie, vasvrae, flitskaarte en eksamenvoorbereiding sonder antwoordkopiëring.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Ja, wanneer dit wenke gee, redenasie kontroleer, foute verduidelik en jou vra om die finale antwoord self te lewer in plaas daarvan om dit vir jou te skryf.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Gebruik KI as ’n afrigter vir begrip, oefening en terugvoer in plaas van ’n kortpad wat die leer stilweg verwyder.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: Die middelste deel raam inspir rondom begrip, wenke, vasvrae en aktiewe leerlusse.

entries.source: Use the linked guide, prompt, subject hub, or learning path to review the weak spot later.
entries.value: Gebruik die gekoppelde gids, prompt, vakhub of leerpad om die swak plek later te hersien.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Die openingsrame stel leer op as iets waarmee enigiemand dadelik moet kan begin.

entries.source: Learn programming, debug concepts, plan projects, interpret data, and research technical questions with public AI modes that keep the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Leer programmering, ontfout begrippe, beplan projekte, interpreteer data en ondersoek tegniese vrae met openbare KI-modusse wat die leerder betrokke hou.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Vra jou eerste vraag en beweeg dadelik na oefening.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Nuuskierige leerders wat wil hê geskiedenis en idees moet ingebed, debatteerbaar en lewendig voel sonder om bewyse uit die oog te verloor.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Skole kan wit-etiket KI-kletservarings aanbied wat vir hul leerders aangepas is, insluitend NCERT-belynde inhoud en werkvloeie, met gebruik wat deur vennootskole of CSR-borgskap befonds word.

entries.source: Each guide points to a mode, prompt, or review loop so reading can become practice.
entries.value: Elke gids wys na ’n modus, prompt of hersieningslus sodat lees in oefening kan verander.

entries.source: Study loops, AI tutoring guides, and practical prompts.
A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: ’n Praktiese gids om Leer Enigiets op inspir vir grondslag-leer te gebruik, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger KI-gewoontes.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors, hesitation, formulas, definitions, and concepts you could not explain clearly.
entries.value: Maak flitskaarte uit foute, huiwering, formules, definisies en begrippe wat jy nie duidelik kon verduidelik nie.

entries.source: Use inspir for homework hints, math step checks, writing feedback, source critique, Socratic questions, and flashcards without exposing private chats.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir vir huiswerkwenke, wiskunde-stapkontroles, skryfterugvoer, bronkritiek, Sokratiese vrae en flitskaarte sonder om privaat kletse bloot te stel.

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.
entries.value: Toets jouself eers met ’n vasvra sodat jy kan sien wat jy werklik onthou en waar selfvertroue misleidend is.

entries.source: You can try public learning modes freely. Saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data stay private.
entries.value: Jy kan openbare leermodusse gratis probeer. Gestoorde kletse, rekeninge, administrasiehulpmiddels en gebruikersdata bly privaat.

entries.source: Understand a historical context, question a perspective, compare claims, and separate simulation from documented fact.
entries.value: Verstaan ’n historiese konteks, bevraagteken ’n perspektief, vergelyk stellings en skei simulasie van gedokumenteerde feit.

entries.source: Use inspir for essay feedback, reading support, speaking practice, source critique, and revision loops that improve structure without replacing the learner's voice.
entries.value: Gebruik inspir vir opstelterugvoer, leesondersteuning, praatoefening, bronkritiek en hersieningslusse wat struktuur verbeter sonder om die leerder se stem te vervang.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Moenie vir ’n volledige opsomming vra voordat jy die voorvereiste idees ken nie.

entries.source: Build an AI exam prep workflow with a realistic study plan, retrieval practice, quizzes, flashcards, and weak-area review.
entries.value: Bou ’n KI-eksamenvoorbereidingswerkvloei met ’n realistiese studieplan, herroepoefening, vasvrae, flitskaarte en hersiening van swak areas.

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Sluit die vraag in, wat jy reeds probeer het, waar jy vasgehaak het en of jy ’n wenk, ’n stapkontrole of terugvoer wil hê.

entries.source: Open a mode and start immediately, with no account needed for the public guest experience.
entries.value: Maak ’n modus oop en begin dadelik, sonder dat ’n rekening vir die openbare gaservaring nodig is.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Begin met ’n onderwerp, opdrag, konsep, eksamen of idee in die modus wat by die taak pas.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Moenie flitskaarte maak uit sinne wat jy nog nie in jou eie woorde kan verduidelik nie.

entries.source: how to understand a hard topic with AI
entries.value: hoe om ’n moeilike onderwerp met KI te verstaan

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Ja. Die openbare gasleermodusse is vir gratis toegang ontwerp, sodat leerders kan begin sonder dat hulle ’n skoolontplooiing of betaalde rekening nodig het.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Die huiswerk- en Sokratiese modusse is ontwerp rondom wenke, redenasie, stapkontroles en leerderverduidelikings, in plaas daarvan om bloot voltooide antwoorde oor te gee.

entries.source: Learners who have limited time, a large syllabus, and need a realistic way to review without pretending everything matters equally.
entries.value: Leerders wat beperkte tyd, ’n groot sillabus en ’n realistiese manier nodig het om te hersien sonder om voor te gee dat alles ewe belangrik is.

entries.source: Free AI learning for everyone | inspir
Can I use inspir without signing in?
entries.value: Kan ek inspir gebruik sonder om aan te meld?

entries.source: Plan the work, practise retrieval, and close weak spots with quizzes and active recall.
entries.value: Beplan die werk, oefen herroeping en maak swak plekke toe met vasvrae en aktiewe herroeping.

entries.source: Talk to a historical figure while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented quotation.
entries.value: Praat met ’n historiese figuur terwyl gegenereerde dialoog apart van gedokumenteerde aanhalings gehou word.

entries.source: After the simulation, summarize the setting, constraints, and evidence.
entries.value: Som ná die simulasie die omgewing, beperkings en bewyse op.

entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Ja. Skole kan eers die openbare produk gebruik en dan pasgemaakte KI-leerruimtes met skoolspesifieke werkvloeie, vertroulikheid en befondsde toegangsopsies bespreek.

entries.source: Math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep each need different help. Start from the subject, then move into the mode, prompt, guide, or review loop that fits.
entries.value: Wiskunde, skryfwerk, kodering, geskiedenis, huiswerk en eksamenvoorbereiding het elkeen verskillende hulp nodig. Begin by die vak en beweeg dan na die modus, prompt, gids of hersieningslus wat pas.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Vra vir ’n eenvoudiger verduideliking van die swakste begrip.

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Debatteer enige onderwerp, word uitgedaag, vergelyk stellings en leer hoe om sterker argumente te maak.

entries.source: Can AI homework help be ethical?
Learn Anything prompts and study loop
A {value1}-guide library built for learning that turns into action.
entries.value: ’n {value1}-gidsbiblioteek wat vir leer gebou is en tot aksie lei.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Moenie ’n opdrag plak en vir die voltooide antwoord vra nie.

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Vrae laat jou jou eie model van die onderwerp blootlê; dit is waar verwarring, valse selfvertroue en ontbrekende voorvereistes gewoonlik verskyn.

entries.source: inspir is being built in public.
entries.value: inspir word in die openbaar gebou.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Vra vrae, daag idees uit en leer geskiedenis deur gegronde gesprekke met openbare figure uit die verlede.

entries.source: Use hints, step checks, and writing feedback without turning the learning into answer copying.
entries.value: Gebruik wenke, stapkontroles en skryfterugvoer sonder om die leer in antwoordkopiëring te verander.

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Waarom ’n Sokratiese KI-tutor idees kan laat vassteek

entries.source: What should I ask first when a topic feels too hard?
entries.value: Wat moet ek eerste vra wanneer ’n onderwerp te moeilik voel?

entries.source: Use the exam date, syllabus, available time, and weak areas to create a plan that can survive real life.
entries.value: Gebruik die eksamendatum, sillabus, beskikbare tyd en swak areas om ’n plan te skep wat regte lewe kan oorleef.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Vra vir vyf vrae wat definisies, voorbeelde en oordragprobleme meng.

entries.source: Switch into questions so you can reveal assumptions and fill gaps instead of passively reading the answer.
entries.value: Skakel oor na vrae sodat jy aannames kan blootlê en gapings kan vul in plaas daarvan om die antwoord passief te lees.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Gebruik KI-tydreise, historiese gesprekke en debatoefening om konteks, bewyse, argumente en perspektiewe te verken.

entries.source: Get a study schedule, quiz yourself on weak areas, and turn misses into flashcards for repeated review.
entries.value: Kry ’n studierooster, toets jouself met ’n vasvra oor swak areas en verander misslae in flitskaarte vir herhaalde hersiening.

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Leer deur gefokusde vrae, wenke en nadenke in plaas van passiewe antwoordlees.

entries.source: Mode guides, prompt loops, study methods, and cornerstone articles for common learning moments.
entries.value: Modusgidse, promptlusse, studiemetodes en hoeksteenartikels vir algemene leermomente.
praat met historiese figure met KI

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Elke modus maak oop as ’n openbare gasklets met sy eie doel, voorbeelde en leervloei, sodat leerders dadelik met die regte soort ondersteuning kan begin.

entries.source: How is inspir different from a generic AI chatbot?
entries.value: Hoe verskil inspir van ’n generiese KI-kletsbot?

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Moenie gegenereerde dialoog as ’n regte aanhaling of primêre bron behandel nie.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Moenie ’n plan maak wat aanvaar dat elke onderwerp ewe veel tyd nodig het nie.

entries.source: Start by asking for a simple explanation, one everyday analogy, and the three ideas you need before the topic will make sense.
entries.value: Begin deur vir ’n eenvoudige verduideliking, een alledaagse analogie en die drie idees wat jy nodig het te vra voordat die onderwerp sin sal maak.

entries.source: Convert the explanation into active recall cards, then revisit the cards after mistakes or hesitation.
entries.value: Omskep die verduideliking in kaarte vir aktiewe herroeping, en besoek die kaarte weer ná foute of huiwering.

entries.source: Can inspir help with homework without encouraging cheating?
entries.value: Kan inspir met huiswerk help sonder om kullery aan te moedig?

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: ’n Gratis openbare KI-leermetgesel vir tutorskap, oefening, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, skryfterugvoer, koderingshulp en studiebeplanning.

entries.source: Learn by talking, testing, debating, and exploring.
entries.value: Leer deur te praat, te toets, te debatteer en te verken.

entries.source: Debate the claim from more than one side so you can notice assumptions, tradeoffs, and weak evidence.
entries.value: Debatteer die stelling van meer as een kant sodat jy aannames, kompromieë en swak bewyse kan raaksien.

entries.source: Plan exam revision, generate quizzes, build flashcards, schedule spaced review, and keep motivation realistic with focused AI learning modes.
entries.value: Beplan eksamenhersiening, genereer vasvrae, bou flitskaarte, skeduleer gespasieerde hersiening en hou motivering realisties met gefokusde KI-leermodusse.

entries.source: Open the exact kind of help you came for.
entries.value: Maak presies die soort hulp oop waarvoor jy gekom het.

entries.source: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: Verander notas of onderwerpe in gefokusde flitskaarte met wenke, antwoorde, voorbeelde en algemene strikke.

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Learn Anything on inspir.
entries.value: Promptidees en ’n herhaalbare studielus om nuttige leerresultate uit Leer Enigiets op inspir te kry.

entries.source: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: Werk deur algebra, differensiaal- en integraalrekening, woordprobleme en wiskundebegrippe een stap op ’n slag met ’n KI-afrigter.

entries.source: Built for curiosity, practice, and access.
entries.value: Gebou vir nuuskierigheid, oefening en toegang.

entries.source: Quiz me on these topics one question at a time. After each answer, explain the gap and increase difficulty slowly.
entries.value: Vra my ’n vasvra oor hierdie onderwerpe, een vraag op ’n slag. Verduidelik ná elke antwoord die gaping en verhoog die moeilikheid stadig.

entries.source: A public learning site people can understand quickly.
entries.value: ’n Openbare leerwerf wat mense vinnig kan verstaan.

entries.source: What learners usually ask before they start.
entries.value: Wat leerders gewoonlik vra voordat hulle begin.

entries.source: Guides, paths, subjects, and prompts connect to the next useful place to practise.
entries.value: Gidse, paaie, vakke en prompts skakel na die volgende nuttige plek om te oefen.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Moenie net die kant debatteer waarmee jy reeds saamstem nie.

entries.source: Leave with a plain-language model, sharper questions, examples you can explain back, and recall cards for review.
entries.value: Stap weg met ’n gewone-taal-model, skerper vrae, voorbeelde wat jy kan terugverduidelik en herroepkaarte vir hersiening.

entries.source: Learners need a sequence, not a pile of links. These paths connect modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Leerders het ’n volgorde nodig, nie ’n hoop skakels nie. Hierdie paaie verbind modusse in praktiese studielusse vir begrip, huiswerk, eksamenvoorbereiding en verkenning.

entries.source: Why use Socratic questions after an explanation?
entries.value: Waarom Sokratiese vrae ná ’n verduideliking gebruik?

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: ’n Praktiese kykie na hoe KI leer duideliker, persoonliker en toegankliker kan maak sonder om studente in passiewe antwoordversamelaars te verander.

entries.source: Use writing feedback for structure, clarity, and evidence while keeping the final draft recognizably yours.
entries.value: Gebruik skryfterugvoer vir struktuur, duidelikheid en bewyse terwyl die finale konsep herkenbaar joune bly.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Vra my vyf Sokratiese vrae oor hierdie onderwerp. Sê ná elke antwoord watter aanname ek gebruik het en wat ek volgende moet toets.
Is inspir gratis om te gebruik?

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Vra die geskiedenismodus om aan te dui wat gedokumenteer, afgelei of gesimuleer is.

entries.source: Make flashcards from errors and revisit them after a delay.
entries.value: Maak flitskaarte uit foute en besoek hulle weer ná ’n vertraging.

entries.source: AI Homework Help Without Copying Answers
entries.value: KI-huiswerkhulp sonder om antwoorde te kopieer

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Vra vir wenke, kontroles, terugvoer en studieplanne wat die denke by die leerder hou.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Moenie nalaat om te wys wat jy reeds probeer het nie; die nuttige hulp hang van daardie konteks af.

entries.source: Check this step in my working. If it is wrong, explain the mistake and give me one next move.
entries.value: Kontroleer hierdie stap in my werk. As dit verkeerd is, verduidelik die fout en gee my een volgende skuif.

entries.source: Place me in this time and location. Label documented facts separately from plausible simulation and ask what I notice.
entries.value: Plaas my in hierdie tyd en plek. Merk gedokumenteerde feite apart van geloofwaardige simulasie en vra wat ek opmerk.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Elke gids eindig met oefenplanne, roetes en skakels na die presiese leermodus wat pas.

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Wat ’n KI-leermetgesel vir almal moet doen

entries.source: A short film introducing inspir's belief that learning should be free, accessible, and alive.
entries.value: ’n Kort film wat inspir se oortuiging bekendstel dat leer gratis, toeganklik en lewendig moet wees.

entries.source: Start from the thing you do not understand and get a plain-language model, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Begin by die ding wat jy nie verstaan nie en kry ’n gewone-taal-model, voorbeelde en volgende stappe.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Gebruik KI-huiswerkafrigting vir wenke, stapkontroles, wiskundige redenasie en skryfterugvoer terwyl die finale werk joune bly.

entries.source: How early should I make an exam prep plan?
entries.value: Hoe vroeg moet ek ’n eksamenvoorbereidingsplan maak?

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Die film beweeg van inspirasie na die praktiese belofte: ’n geduldige KI-leermetgesel.

entries.source: Start from the subject, then open the right learning mode.
entries.value: Begin by die vak en maak dan die regte leermodus oop.

entries.source: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Verbeter skryfwerk met beplanning, hersiening, struktuur en terugvoer wat jou stem behou.

entries.source: Not another answer box. A place to learn.
entries.value: Nie nog ’n antwoordboks nie. ’n Plek om te leer.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Moenie toelaat dat rolspel datums, konteks, dokumente of bewysetikette vervang nie.

entries.source: Start as soon as you know the exam date. If time is short, prioritize weak areas, past-paper style questions, and daily recall.
entries.value: Begin sodra jy die eksamendatum ken. As tyd min is, prioritiseer swak areas, vrae in die styl van vorige vraestelle en daaglikse herroeping.

entries.source: After each hint, explain why the step works before continuing.
entries.value: Verduidelik ná elke wenk waarom die stap werk voordat jy voortgaan.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Elke artikel skakel na kategorieë, lewendige modusse, vakhubs, leerpaaie en verwante gidse.

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Nuuskierigheid, oefening en KI wat onderrig.

entries.source: Explain this topic in plain language. Name the three prerequisite ideas I need, one analogy, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Verduidelik hierdie onderwerp in gewone taal. Noem die drie voorvereiste idees wat ek nodig het, een analogie en een algemene wanopvatting.

entries.source: Turn the hardest missed question into a flashcard and review it later.
entries.value: Verander die moeilikste gemiste vraag in ’n flitskaart en hersien dit later.
